name: @lindemannrock/search-manager
description: Build tools for Search Manager asset packages

scripts.build: npm run build:analytics && npm run build:widgetpreview && npm run build:testtool
scripts.build:testtool: mkdir -p testtool/dist && terser testtool/src/test-tool.js -o testtool/dist/test-tool.js -c -m && cp testtool/src/test-tool.css testtool/dist/test-tool.css
